title: Create Portal Swirl Animation System
description: Build the signature Rick portal animation for agent spawning events. Use SVG or Canvas to render a green swirling vortex that expands, swirls, and collapses. Trigger on spawn_agent events. Include sound effect hook (optional, disabled by default). This is the visual proof that interdimensional genius is at work.
acceptance_criteria: SVG-based portal animation with rotating gradient spirals
Portal renders centered on spawn location in Agent Monitor view
Portal green color (#39ff14) with radial gradient fade
Animation triggered via custom event or React context
Reduced-motion media query disables animation for accessibility
Optional audio hook for portal sound (user configurable)
agent_output: Implemented Portal Swirl Animation System with CSS keyframes: portal-spin, portal-pulse, portal-open, portal-close, portal-swirl-bg, portal-ripple. Portal.tsx component with Portal, PortalMini, PortalSpawn, and PortalButton.
